statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Lychrel Problem — 定理 12 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP Lychrel — Lychrel conjecture / 196 problem finite verification
  ====================================================================

  Conjecture (informal, base 10):
    Iterating n ↦ n + reverse(n) eventually produces a palindrome
    for every positive integer n.

  Lychrel numbers: candidates that never reach a palindrome.
  Smallest base-10 candidate: n = 196 (Wade VanLandingham verified > 10⁹ iterations).
  OPEN: status of 196 is unproven (not known to be a Lychrel number or not).

  Rei STEP Lychrel (2026-04-21):
    Verified n ∈ [1, 1000] with K = 500 iterations:
      - 987/100

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
